changeSet.author: juliwolf
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_unique_rel_comp_attr_rel_comp_attribute_type_deleted_flag ON "relation_component_attribute" (relation_component_id, attribute_type_id, deleted_flag) WHERE deleted_flag = false;

changeSet.author: juliwolf
changeSet.sql: insert into entity (entity_id, entity_name, deleted_flag) values ('5c06a7c1-5b3f-49f4-bdc2-e9df4f317d73', 'RELATION_COMPONENT_ATTRIBUTE', false) ON CONFLICT DO nothing;

changeSet.author: juliwolf
